config.script:
try:
		from java.util import Date
		from java.text import SimpleDateFormat

		dateInput = self.getSibling("DateTimeInput").props.value
		
		# Check if date exists before formatting
		if dateInput is not None:
		    startTimeFormatted = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss").format(dateInput)
		else:
		    system.perspective.print("No date selected")
		    startTimeFormatted = None  # or handle the empty case appropriately
		    
		QueryURL = 'Project_VECV/Report/getQualityDefectCount'

		cols = system.db.runNamedQuery(QueryURL,{'date': startTimeFormatted, 'WorkStationName': "LAQG01"})
		self.parent.parent.getChild("QG01FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data=cols
		
		cols = system.db.runNamedQuery(QueryURL,{'date': startTimeFormatted, 'WorkStationName': "LAQG02"})
		self.parent.parent.getChild("QG02FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data=cols
		
		cols = system.db.runNamedQuery(QueryURL,{'date': startTimeFormatted, 'WorkStationName': "LAQG03"})
		self.parent.parent.getChild("QG03FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data=cols
		
		cols = system.db.runNamedQuery(QueryURL,{'date': startTimeFormatted, 'WorkStationName': "LAQG04"})
		self.parent.parent.getChild("QG04FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data=cols
		
		cols = system.db.runNamedQuery(QueryURL,{'date': startTimeFormatted, 'WorkStationName': "LAQG04"})
		self.parent.parent.getChild("QG05FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data=cols
		
		cols = system.db.runNamedQuery(QueryURL,{'date': startTimeFormatted, 'WorkStationName': "LAPDI"})
		self.parent.parent.getChild("QGPDIFlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data=cols
		
	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print('error msg= %s'%e)

self.parent.parent.getChild("QG01FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data=None
	self.parent.parent.getChild("QG02FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data=None
	self.parent.parent.getChild("QG03FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data=None
	self.parent.parent.getChild("QG04FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data=None
	self.parent.parent.getChild("QG05FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data=None
	self.parent.parent.getChild("QGPDIFlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data=None
	self.parent.parent.getChild("QGPDIFlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data=None
	self.getSibling("DateTimeInput").props.value=None
	system.perspective.print("Exit")

	# Set the clear mode parameter to 1 (triggers an empty result set)

import system
      table1Data = self.parent.parent.getChild("QG01FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data
      table2Data = self.parent.parent.getChild("QG02FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data
      table3Data = self.parent.parent.getChild("QG03FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data
      table4Data = self.parent.parent.getChild("QG04FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data
      table5Data = self.parent.parent.getChild("QG05FlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data
      table6Data = self.parent.parent.getChild("QGPDIFlexCnt").getChild("Table").props.data
      # Check if at least one table has data
      if any([table1Data, table2Data, table3Data, table4Data,table5Data,table6Data]):
          csvData = ""
      
          # Function to convert dataset to CSV string
          def datasetToCSV(data, title):
              if data:
                  csvString = system.dataset.toCSV(data, showHeaders=True)
                  return "\n{}\n{}".format(title, csvString)
              return ""
      
          # Append data from all tables with section titles
          csvData += datasetToCSV(table1Data, "QG01 Data")
          csvData += datasetToCSV(table2Data, "QG02 Data")
          csvData += datasetToCSV(table3Data, "QG03 Data")
          csvData += datasetToCSV(table4Data, "QG04 Data")
          csvData += datasetToCSV(table5Data, "QG05 Data")
          csvData += datasetToCSV(table6Data, "PDI Data")
      
          # Write CSV to temp file
          filePath = system.file.getTempFile("LegacyDefectReport.csv")
          system.file.writeFile(filePath, csvData)
      
          # Read and download CSV
          fileName = "LegacyDefectReport.csv"
          csvBytes = system.file.readFileAsBytes(filePath)
          system.perspective.download(fileName, csvBytes)
      
          # Success message
          message = "File downloaded successfully"
          system.perspective.print(message)
      else:
          message = "Please first Retrieve data and then Download CSV"
          system.perspective.print(message)
